description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a sleek, minimalist design, upholstered in smooth gray material. The sofa features two large seat cushions and three back cushions, with two beige accent throw pillows adding a touch of contrast. The armrests are straight, broad, and padded, matching the overall boxy silhouette of the sofa. The legs are short, metallic, and positioned at the corners, providing a subtle lift and a contemporary feel. The backrest is straight and continuous, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching, emphasizing a clean and understated look. The upholstery appears solid in color and texture, contributing to the sofa's modern urban appeal.
description: A sleek, gray three-seater sofa with straight padded armrests, metallic legs, and beige accent pillows, featuring smooth solid upholstery and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, three back cushions, two seat cushions, and two beige accent pillows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, padded armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unadorned backrest and the metallic legs at the corners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the armrest and the arrangement of the cushions from a different angle.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and three back cushions, all loose and uniform in size, with two loose beige throw pillows placed asymmetrically.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad, and padded armrests at each end, matching the sofa's height and featuring a boxy, minimalist profile with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, metallic legs positioned at the corners, straight and exposed, with a simple, modern design.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest of medium height, with three loose back cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray upholstery with a smooth, untextured finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
